chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reasons for the Obligation of Zakat

text: 1576 - وَ رَوَى مُوسَى بْنُ بَكْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «حَصِّنُوا أَمْوَالَكُمْ بِالزَّكَاةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1576 - Musa ibn Bakr reported from Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) who said: "Protect your wealth through Zakat."
